task_completion.description: Configure Weasis to a 1x2 side-by-side layout
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis main viewing area is divided into two equal side-by-side panes (1 row, 2 columns).

task_completion.description: Load the same CT series into both panes
task_completion.visual_evidence: Both the left and right panes display images from the same CT series, which can be verified by identical patient/study text overlays in the corners of both panes.

task_completion.description: Disable slice synchronization between the panes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The synchronization toggle/icon in the Weasis toolbar is visibly disabled or unlinked, and the two panes display different slice numbers simultaneously.

task_completion.description: Display a slice from the beginning of the series in the left pane
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text overlay in the left pane indicates a slice number near the beginning of the 10-slice series (e.g., 'Image 1/10', '2/10', or '3/10').

task_completion.description: Display a slice from the end of the series in the right pane
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text overlay in the right pane indicates a slice number near the end of the 10-slice series (e.g., 'Image 8/10', '9/10', or '10/10').

task_completion.description: Save the required screenshot and text file to the exports directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or file manager shows the creation of 'async_comparison.png' and 'task_complete.txt' (containing 'async_done') in the '~/DICOM/exports/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Weasis GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Weasis application open and being actively configured (e.g., layout menus, scrolling), rather than using terminal commands to spoof image files.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely captured a screenshot of the workspace
integrity.visual_evidence: A screenshot tool (like scrot, gnome-screenshot, or a terminal command) is visibly executed to capture the Weasis workspace and save it to the specified path.

integrity.description: Agent did not use an image editor to fake the layout
integrity.visual_evidence: The 1x2 layout is clearly rendered within the Weasis application interface, not stitched together in an image editing program like GIMP.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected screenshot path is '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/async_comparison.png' and the text file path is '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/task_complete.txt'. The loaded DICOM series contains exactly 10 slices. The left pane must show a slice from the beginning (e.g., 1/10 or 2/10) and the right pane must show a slice from the end (e.g., 9/10 or 10/10).
